title: narcissus bulbocodium var. obesus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. obesus, also known as the slender tunic flower, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anthelmintic, diuretic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Narcissus bulbocodium var. obesus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties.
